name: Rakul C Kandavel
summary: Full-stack and mobile developer with 3+ years of experience building scalable applications using React, React Native, TypeScript, and cloud platforms including Firebase, Supabase, and AWS. Proven track record delivering production-grade mobile and web apps with AI integrations, real-time data pipelines, and accessibility compliance.

experience.title: Lead Developer
bullets: Led front-end development and scaling of an AI-powered social shopping platform on cloud infrastructure, integrating Gemini APIs for virtual try-ons and AI stylist features, driving adoption by 1,000+ active users across AWS and Firebase.
Developed responsive interfaces with JavaScript, TypeScript, React, and React Native, ensuring accessibility compliance (WCAG) and high performance across iOS and Android.
Engineered and optimized APIs on Supabase and Firebase for authentication, cloud functions, and real-time data, supporting thousands of concurrent sessions.
Applied modular micro-architecture and Git workflows to ensure reliability, collaboration, and rapid deployment.

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Designed a wellness app integrating Gemini, OpenAI, and Spoonacular APIs to deliver personalized chatbot recommendations.
Supported 500+ monthly active users, handling real-time personalization workflows with Supabase functions.
Applied prompt engineering and schema ingestion pipelines, boosting recommendation accuracy and user satisfaction.
Refactored the codebase into scalable TypeScript modules and optimized state management for performance.

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Built a healthcare appointment booking system with React Native front-end and Firebase APIs for real-time scheduling and secure data handling.
Platform adopted by 200+ patients and healthcare providers during the pilot launch, processing hundreds of bookings without system downtime.
Delivered responsive, mobile-first UI using React Native and Tailwind, improving patient booking engagement by 40%.

experience.title: Research Assistant
bullets: Developed LSTM-based predictive model for time-series forecasting with 92% accuracy, driving actionable insights at scale.
Built a web application to present predictive analytics, enhancing accessibility compliance (WCAG) and high performance for non-technical stakeholders.

experience.title: Intern
bullets: Designed next-gen HMI infotainment prototypes using Figma and Adobe Suite, aligning with user-centric and bold design principles.
Collaborated with cross-functional hardware and software teams to ship production-ready concepts.
